g.style: font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;font-weight:bold;font-stretch:normal;font-size:144px;line-height:125%;font-family:'Kozuka Gothic Pro B';-inkscape-font-specification:'Kozuka Gothic Pro B Bold';text-align:center;letter-spacing:0px;word-spacing:0px;text-anchor:middle;fill:#000000;fill-opacity:1;stroke:none
